accepted: five-level recursive hierarchy with local autonomy at every level
ResponseCell as the minimum federable operational unit
isolated team and network namespaces with explicit peer agreements
optional redundant coordination hubs without cell authority or keys
outbound-only minimal-disclosure federation and encrypted carry fallback
stale-trust operation that preserves local distress and restricts sensitive changes
append-only deterministic reconciliation with visible unresolved conflicts
not_accepted: capacity, throughput, latency or representative performance at 50,000 sites
physical RF coexistence, coverage, airtime or field readiness
a single incident-wide LoRa mesh, central service or cloud critical dependency
hub decryption, operator acceptance, radio TX authority or source-log overwrite
implementation-specific key custody, enrollment or operational SOP readiness
OS-07 or later Open Spec tasks
